title: Buile Suibhne: The Madness of Sweeney
description: A king cursed to live as a bird-man in the trees, composing the most beautiful nature poetry in medieval Irish literature.
introduction: A king cursed to live as a bird-man in the trees, composing the most beautiful nature poetry in medieval Irish literature.

translation.text: I would live happy in the tops of the trees, the wind in my hair, eating watercress.
